Dataset name: GambleAware Annual GB Treatment and Support Survey
Access status: Safeguarded data; application required via GeoDS/CDRC or UKDS
Access route: Safeguarded application via Geographic Data Service (CDRC) or UK Data Service (SN 9536)
Open/public items: Aggregated data tables (Excel) publicly downloadable from GambleAware for 2021-2024; local area data profiles for 2022-2024; annual reports (PDF) publicly available; metadata viewable on GeoDS without login
Gated items: Anonymised individual-level response data (CSV); variable dictionary; technical reports require GeoDS login
Ethics/proposal likely?: Likely required for safeguarded data access
TRE / secure environment: Not stated; data provided as safeguarded CSV files
Data format / notes: Individual-level data in CSV format. 10 resources on GeoDS: 4 technical reports, 1 variable dictionary, 5 data summary files. LSOA-level geographies available for 2019, 2020, 2022 waves.
Notes: GeoDS temporal coverage currently listed as Jan 2019 to Dec 2022; 2023 and 2024 waves may be added. DOI: 10.5255/UKDA-SN-9536-1 (UKDS).
